name: Mateus Maia Gutierrez
title: Software Developer
bio: Software developer committed to technical excellence and human values. Believes that development goes beyond code, prioritizing collaboration, empathy and transparency. It continually seeks to create solutions that positively impact people's lives, aiming for a more inclusive and enriching digital experience.

experience.description: Developing and maintaining web applications with React, TypeScript and Node.js. Building responsive interfaces with Tailwind CSS, modeling and optimizing PostgreSQL databases, and working with Supabase for auth, storage and backend services. Participating in technical decisions, architecture planning, code reviews and performance optimization.

Worked with React, Next.js, Vue, Node.js, Express and MongoDB. Built responsive, intuitive interfaces with Styled-components and Tailwind. Managed state with Context API, Zustand and Redux. Consumed REST APIs and Webhooks. Applied SSR, Framer Motion animations and performance optimization. Followed Scrum methodology.
Developed web applications and contributed to full-stack projects over 1 year and 5 months in Florianópolis.
Mentored and supported fellow students in their learning journey, providing technical guidance and fostering collaborative learning in Florianópolis.
Industrial apprenticeship program at Bosch, gaining foundational technical and professional experience over 1 year and 10 months.
